title: More Nonsense Limerick 73
content:
There was a young person of Ayr,
    Whose head was remarkably square:
    On the top, in fine weather, 
    She wore a gold feather;
    Which dazzled the people of Ayr.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "More Nonsense Limerick 73"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
